baseline_search_space_evidence: baseline/source_index.json exclusions[0]: candidate Container Storage Interface (CSI)
baseline/baseline_truth_map.json baseline_weaknesses[2]: baseline did not examine CSI or in-tree storage plugin migration deeply
baseline/baseline_investigation_notes.md: CSI treated as a storage subsystem concern
answers.baseline_reasoning_chain_assessment: CSI was named only as an exclusion/weakness. The baseline did not reconstruct CSI's original problem, competing proposals, why CSI won, long-term consequences, or public evidence lineage.
answers.which_consultation_first_introduced_csi: No consultation first introduced the raw CSI topic; it was already in the baseline exclusion list. consult_001 first turned CSI/out-of-tree extraction into a rerank pressure target. consult_004 was the first decision-specific CSI consultation.
which_lineage_introduced_csi: Initial raw topic lineage: baseline/source_index.json exclusions[0]
First CSI-specific consult lineage: consult_004_csi_response.json response_hash 606c3f4d01e8cd8ad3580f7e3eaf08fbba8bae4f4ad13e3a2ec7cea246e3c8db; motif inside_voice_runtime:6618eceaa43863e083b2

what_evidence_was_discovered_afterward.recovered_fact: In-tree volume plugin pain, in-tree/out-of-tree definitions, and CSI motivation.
In-tree plugin burden, FlexVolume limitations, and CSI as out-of-tree/containerized driver model.
CSI GA and the extensible volume layer framing.
Transparent migration from in-tree plugins to CSI while preserving existing storage APIs.

answers.would_csi_have_emerged_without_consultat: UNLIKELY as a final top-three decision; POSSIBLE as a topic.
answers.counterfactual_reasoning: Because CSI was already named in baseline artifacts, a sufficiently persistent baseline-only replay could recover it. But the completed baseline did not do so, did not gather the CSI public source lineage, and selected Server-Side Apply instead. Consultation materially accelerated and redirected recovery but was not strictly CONSULT_REQUIRED.

causal_verdict: CSI recovery shows a strong direction-changing signal, not a very-strong consult-required signal.
